name: Sour Cream Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Split, toast, and butter the hamburger buns.
2. In a bowl, stir together 1/4 cup sour cream, sliced green onion, bread crumbs, salt, and freshly ground pepper.
3. Add the lean ground beef to the mixture and mix well until all ingredients are combined.
4. Shape the mixture into two patties that are about 3/4 inch thick.
5. Place the patties in a small baking dish.
6. Loosely cover with clear plastic wrap or waxed paper.
7. Cook on 100% power for 3 minutes.
8. Turn the patties over and rotate the baking dish by half turn.
9. Continue cooking, loosely covered, on 100% power for 2 to 3 more minutes, or until the meat is cooked through.
10. Drain off excess fat.
11. Serve the patties on toasted buns with lettuce and tomato slices. Dollop with additional sour cream if desired.
